title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani joins Holi celebrations at Richmond Hill Phagwah parade
summary_full: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani joined thousands in Richmond Hill, Queens, for the 38th Annual Phagwah Parade, celebrating the Indo-Caribbean festival of Holi. The vibrant event, marking the triumph of good over evil and the arrival of spring, brought color, music, and tradition to the streets, fostering happiness and harmony.
